leadText: The Mind Plate (Japanese: ふしぎのプレート Mysterious Plate) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It is a Key Item in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is one of the Plates, which are associated with Arceus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 20%. If the holder uses Judgment , it becomes a Psychic-type move. Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Psychic-type form . From Generation V onward, item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Arceus a Plate or remove a Plate from Arceus. In Generation IV, item-manipulating effects cannot affect Pokémon with Multitype. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Psychic-type form . In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , the Mind Plate can used from the satchel on Arceus , changing it to the Psychic type . The Mind Plate can be read, and has the following engraving: "The Original One breathed alone before the universe came."

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves by 20%. If the holder uses Judgment , it becomes a Psychic-type move. Multitype changes an Arceus holding this item to its Psychic-type form . From Generation V onward, item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give Arceus a Plate or remove a Plate from Arceus. In Generation IV, item-manipulating effects cannot affect Pokémon with Multitype.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Solaceon Ruins , Underground HG SS S.S. Aqua (from the captain after obtaining all 16 Gym Badges ) B W B2 W2 Abyssal Ruins X Y Route 10 OR AS Route 126 ( underwater ) S M US UM Route 1 BD SP Solaceon Ruins Grand Underground LA Heights Camp (reward from Wyrdeer during Mission 7: "The Frenzy of the Lord of the Woods") S V Porto Marinada auction (if the player owns an Arceus ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period X Y OR AS Dahara City Arceus Japanese, Taiwanese March 7 to August 31, 2015 November 20 to December 17, 2015

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a stone tablet that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a stone tablet that boosts the power of Psychic-type moves. LA A stone tablet imbued with the essence of psychic energy. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Psychic type. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of psychic energy and boosts the power of the holder’s Psychic-type moves.
